caption: In a studio setting, a man is recording a podcast. He wears a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a red bowtie, glasses, over-ear headphones, and a tall, grey, stylized wig. He sits before a black professional microphone. In the background, a woman with red hair and a green dress stands near clothing racks and a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS." The walls are adorned with framed photos and a yellow shield logo. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and the text "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the camera angle shifts from a front-facing medium shot to a side profile. The man remains seated and speaks, gesturing with his hand in some shots, while the woman remains stationary in the background.
